# Claude Code (Fork by Dek1MillionToken)

> Multi-provider AI coding CLI with Kanban task orchestration, plugin system, and subagent support. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, and local Ollama.

## Setup

- [README.md](README.md) ‚Äî Project overview, installation, getting started
- [docs/DEVELOPMENT.md](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md) ‚Äî Dev environment setup, build, testing
- [docs/CONFIGURATION.md](docs/CONFIGURATION.md) ‚Äî Provider keys, model config, permission policies
- [docs/INSEARCH_SETUP.md](docs/INSEARCH_SETUP.md) ‚Äî Provider-specific setup guides
- [docs/TESTING.md](docs/TESTING.md) ‚Äî Test strategy, coverage, running tests

## Core Concepts

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) ‚Äî AI assistant project guide (for agents reading this repo)
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) ‚Äî High-level system architecture
- [docs/API.md](docs/API.md) ‚Äî Core API references and type definitions

## Kanban System

- [docs/kanban-agent-runtime.md](docs/kanban-agent-runtime.md) ‚Äî Agent/worker lifecycle protocol
- [docs/kanban-workers.md](docs/kanban-workers.md) ‚Äî Worker registry, heartbeat, stale recovery, lease system
- `src/utils/kanban/` ‚Äî Store, server, worker, validation, markdown rendering, agent runtime

**Quick Kanban Commands:** `init` ‚Üí `create` ‚Üí `list` ‚Üí `move` ‚Üí `complete` ‚Üí `fail` | `server` (dashboard) | `worker` (autonomous)

## Commands Reference

- [docs/COMMANDS.md](docs/COMMANDS.md) ‚Äî All slash commands by category (Session, Config, Tools, Agent, Kanban, Git, etc.)

## Usage & Troubleshooting

- [docs/USAGE.md](docs/USAGE.md) ‚Äî End-user workflows, examples, patterns
- [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) ‚Äî Common issues, diagnostics (`/doctor`), CRLF workarounds
- [docs/EXAMPLES.md](docs/EXAMPLES.md) ‚Äî Usage examples and configuration recipes

## Plugins & Extensibility

- `src/plugins/` ‚Äî Built-in plugins with hook system (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreBash, PostPrompt, PreAcceptEdit)
- `plugins/` ‚Äî Community/extension plugins
- Hook points defined in `CLAUDE.md` plugin system section

## Language Servers

- [docs/LSP.md](docs/LSP.md) ‚Äî LSP server setup and capabilities
- [docs/LSP-EMACS.md](docs/LSP-EMACS.md) ‚Äî Emacs integration guide

## Project Structure

```
src/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.tsx          # CLI entry point
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ cli/              # React/Ink TUI components
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ commands/         # 100+ slash commands
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ services/ai/      # Multi-provider system (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, OpenRouter, Ollama)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ infra/tools/      # 40+ built-in tools (Read, Edit, Bash, Git, WebFetch, Agent, Task, MCP, LSP, Skill)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ utils/kanban/     # Task board: store, server, worker, validation, markdown
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tasks/            # Task framework (LocalAgentTask, progress tracking)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ plugins/          # Plugin system and hooks
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ bridge/           # WebSocket remote collaboration
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ browser/          # Browser automation via CDP
```

- [docs/NOTICE.md](docs/NOTICE.md) ‚Äî Source code liberation notice (read first)
- [docs/LEGAL.md](docs/LEGAL.md) ‚Äî Rights, code, and freedom declaration
- [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ‚Äî License terms
- [RESEARCH_MISSION.md](RESEARCH_MISSION.md) ‚Äî Academic research goals
